title: AgeOfEmpire
fullTitle: Pathfinding Simulation, Benchmarking, and RTS Game Implementation
domain: Algorithm Research | Game AI | Simulation Engineering
description: Research-grade benchmarking framework evaluating 35+ pathfinding algorithms across game-realistic environments, paired with an RTS game validating top algorithms in live gameplay.
overview: This suite comprises two interconnected projects: a research-grade benchmarking framework that evaluates 35+ pathfinding algorithms across controlled game-realistic environments, and an RTS game (Project Rescue Run) that deploys the top two algorithms in a live interactive game loop to validate results under real gameplay constraints.

features.label: 35+ Algorithm Benchmarking
features.description: Classical, metaheuristics, and field-based algorithms benchmarked across four scenario types.

features.label: Four Scenario Types
features.description: Static, fog-of-war, dynamic obstacles, and hybrid (dynamic + fog-of-war).

features.label: RTS Game Validation
features.description: Interactive game validating Flow Field vs A* with dynamic terrain and multiple unit types.

features.label: Multi-Unit System
features.description: Scout (speed), Tank (armor), Phantom (wall traversal) with difficulty-scaled enemy AI.

algorithms.name: Flow Field
algorithms.description: Global cost-to-go map via BFS/Dijkstra, vector directions per cell.

algorithms.name: D* Lite
algorithms.description: Incremental replanning: rhs(s) = min_{s' ∈ Succ(s)}(c(s,s') + g(s')).

algorithms.name: Genetic Algorithm
algorithms.description: Fitness = 1/path_length, evolves via selection + crossover + mutation.

algorithms.name: Theta* (Any-Angle)
algorithms.description: Line of Sight shortcuts for smoother paths.

modules.name: Benchmarking Framework
modules.responsibility: 35+ algorithm implementations, scenario generation, metric collection

modules.name: Game Engine (main.py)
modules.responsibility: Game state, terrain, enemy AI, pathfinding toggle

results: Flow Field ranked #1 overall in standard scenarios
100% success rate for Flow Field, ACO, MMAS in dynamic obstacles
Most classical algorithms 0% success in fog-of-war + dynamic scenarios
Live RTS game validates research findings under real gameplay constraints
